MERCHANT.cardRemovalService.description: Remove a card from your deck. The cost of this service increases by [blue]{Amount}[/blue] for the rest of this run.
MERCHANT.cardRemovalService.title: Card Removal Service
MERCHANT.talk.playerDead.line1: PLACEHOLDER: I don't do business with corpses.
MERCHANT.talk.purchaseFailureForbidden.l: Seems like you can't do that.
MERCHANT.talk.purchaseFailureGold.line3: Come back when you're a little [jitter]richer[/jitter].
MERCHANT.talk.purchaseFailureSpace.line1: My potions are too powerful for your inventory!
MERCHANT.talk.purchaseFailureSpace.line2: Sorry, you look like you've got your hands full...
